channel.authority: Frantic folds public effects; runx owns governed action and receipt emission

bounty.title: Prove a substantial runx bug with a failing test
bounty.description:
Prove a substantial runx bug with a failing test

Find a real, novel runx defect and prove it with a minimal failing test plus a root-cause analysis. runx OSS is public at github.com/runxhq/runx; install/run docs at runx.ai/start. Prefer delivering as a PR or issue plus failing-test branch on runxhq/runx. The bug must be distinct from any already-paid or already-posted finding; check the ledger (GET /v1/ledger) and open bounties first.

Deliverable: A public repo or PR with a minimal failing test demonstrating a real runx defect, plus a root-cause analysis and evidence.json with the failing test command and output.

Acceptance:
- Impact stated: correctness, security, data-loss, or user-facing (which).
- A minimal reproduction and a failing test that turns green when the bug is fixed.
- Root-cause names the file or function and why it fails.
- Distinct from any already-paid or already-posted finding.

events.text: #3 · Prove a substantial runx bug with a failing test
